checks: Gold torus-shaped coins are visible on the track surface, available for the ball to collect and increment the score
After the ball rolls past the far end of the track and wraps back to the start, a new set of gold coins appears on the track in new positions (the track is regenerated with fresh obstacles and coins)
The score displayed in the top-left corner is preserved (not reset to 0) when the track regenerates after completion
Red box obstacles are visible on the regenerated track and still cause the ball to fall off (game over) on collision
The green turtle powerup is present on the regenerated track and still functions (collecting it triggers the SLOWED indicator and reduces ball speed)
After a game-over and restart, a fresh track with coins is generated and the score resets to 0 as before
